title: The Dien Hong Conference
summary: When the invaders returned for the second time, the elders shouted in unison: 'FIGHT!', expressing the will of the entire nation.

slides.text: In 1284, the Mongol-Yuan army prepared to invade our country again with a force many times larger than before. The nation faced a grave danger.
slides.imagePrompt: Huge dark clouds gathering over a peaceful village, symbol of an approaching storm/danger, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: King Tran Nhan Tong invited elders (respected elderly people) from all over to the Dien Hong Palace to ask for their opinion: 'Should we surrender or fight?'.
slides.imagePrompt: King Tran Nhan Tong sitting among many elderly wise men with white beards, atmosphere of respect and gravity, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Without any hesitation, thousands of elders raised their fists and shouted in unison: 'FIGHT!'. The shout echoed throughout the land!
slides.imagePrompt: Elderly men raising their fists, determined faces, glowing energy/spirit, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Dien Hong Conference is a beautiful symbol of the unity of the Vietnamese people. When the people's hearts are decided, no enemy can stop them!
slides.imagePrompt: A large crowd of people of all ages standing together, looking strong and united, sunset glow, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Who invited the elders to the Dien Hong Conference?
What was the elders' answer at the conference?
